articles.summary: Barry Manilow Again Postpones Las Vegas Shows, Making ‘Great Progress’ After Lung Cancer Battle. Barry Manilow has once again postponed his upcoming Las Vegas shows as the singer works his way back from a lung cancer diagnosis late last year.

articles.title: Details of Emma Raducanu’s coaching plan revealed after short training spell in Spain
articles.sourceName: HITC - Football, Gaming, Movies, TV, Music
articles.summary: Details of Emma Raducanu’s coaching plan revealed after short training spell in Spain. Emma Raducanu hasn’t been seen on court since early March, and while illness kept her out initially, she’s since chosen to stay away from the limelight. That decision seems to be more than just about recovering from illness.
